name: MAN Truck & Bus DTC starter (J1939 SPN-FMI + MAN-cats)

dtcs.description: MAN — Fuel delivery pressure circuit voltage low (D26 / D08)
MAN — High-pressure fuel rail sensor voltage high
MAN — DEF tank level low (refill warning)
MAN — DPF differential pressure high (regen needed)
MAN — DPF soot load most severe (parked regen mandatory)
MAN — DEF inducement engaged (engine power derate)
MAN — J1939 backbone communication abnormal update rate
